issues.description: Action type 'RemoveLife' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards', which means FlipLife (convert Life to hand), not RemoveLife (remove from game). The cost is paid by flipping a Life card.
Two separate effects with different triggers (Activated and Trigger) is incorrect. This is a single [Main] ability triggered by Activated. The second effect (Trigger) should not exist.

RemoveLife should be a cost (condition/prerequisite), not an action. The ability cost must be represented differently—typically as a conditional or cost specification, not as an action in the effects array.
